rulings.Case Title: GEORGE BALLARD COMPANY, A CORPORATION VS. PARAMOUNT HOSPITALITY MANAGEMENT, LLC, A LIMITED et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION To Strike Ans Of Non-Represented Limited Liability Company Deft & Request To Enter Default Or To Designate Counsel
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON APRIL 17, 2006. PLAINTIFF GEORGE BALLARD COMPANY'S MOTION To Strike AnsWER Of Non-Represented Limited Liability Company DeFENDANT AND Request To Enter Default Or To Designate Counsel IS GRANTED, DEFENDANT TO OBTAIN COUNSEL BY MAY 17, 2006. IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO DO SO IN A TIMELY MANNER, THEN PLAINTIFF MAY BRING AN EX PARTE APPLICATION TO STRIKE DEFENDANT'S ANSWER AND ENTER DEFAULT. =(302/JUDGE WARREN)
